faq.question: What does karat mean for gold?
faq.answer: Karat measures gold purity out of 24 parts. 24K is pure gold, 18K is 75% gold and 25% alloy metals, 14K is 58.3% gold.

faq.question: Which karat gold is best for jewelry?
faq.answer: 14K and 18K are most popular for jewelry. 14K offers good durability and affordability, while 18K has richer color but is softer.
